projectDescription: Alloco is an onchain ETP (Exchange-Traded Product) issuance and access platform that turns market themes, professional strategies, and investment ideas into structured, transparent, globally accessible financial products.
keyFeatures: Onchain ETP issuance and access infrastructure
KOL ETP: portfolios and signals from market voices
Hedge Fund ETP: proven fund strategies wrapped onchain
Stable Yield ETP: structured yield products
Themes ETP: curated baskets around long-term macro themes
Private Markets access: PE & VC opportunities onchain
Three-layer NAV system: Official NAV, iNAV, Risk NAV
Multi-route liquidity: DEX, RFQ, primary create/redeem
Transparent prospectus, risk disclosures, and custody overview
Custom ETP creation for institutions and professional issuers
publicApiSurface: Secondary market trading via DEX / swap
RFQ (Request for Quote) for medium-size orders
NAV / iNAV / Risk NAV display and pricing
